user.title: HACS Vision
user.description: Set up HACS Vision panel. Make sure HACS is already installed.

abort.single_instance_allowed: Only a single instance of HACS Vision is allowed.
abort.hacs_not_found: HACS integration is required but not found.

init.title: HACS Vision
init.description:
Current version: {version}

No additional configuration is needed for this integration.

refresh.name: Refresh HACS data
refresh.description: Force refresh of HACS repository data.

find_entity_refs.name: Find entity references
find_entity_refs.description: Find all references to an entity_id across HA (automations, scripts, scenes, dashboards, blueprints).

entity_id.name: Entity ID
entity_id.description: The entity identifier to search for (e.g. sensor.temperature).

replace_entity_refs.name: Replace entity references
replace_entity_refs.description: Replace all references to an old entity_id with a new one across HA.

old_id.name: Old Entity ID
old_id.description: The old entity identifier to be replaced.

new_id.name: New Entity ID
new_id.description: The new entity identifier to replace with.

preview.name: Preview mode
preview.description: True to preview only, false to execute the replacement.
